_doc: Combat archetype + rank tuning for Raven Hollow (BLUEPRINT_33_COMBAT_RETUNE / COMBAT_PACING.md). Data-driven so designers tune feel without code. hp_mult/dmg_mult are the FAMILY_MULT / RANK_MULT tuning law (COMBAT_PACING s4); scripts/mob_scaling.gd reads this file, scripts/enemy.gd reads per-archetype behavior. Zone creature_table rows carry level/archetype/rank; their hp/damage are the hand-nudged shipped truth generated from these mults (verify with tools/retune_tables.py).

brute.note: skeletons, thread-touched dead: slow, steady, telegraphed heavy 3rd swing. Teaches rotation fundamentals + dodge rhythm.

stalker.note: wolves: fast flanking packs, aggro x2 at night. Teaches kiting + careful pulls.

charger.note: boars: telegraphed locked line charge + enrage under 30%. Teaches sidestep telegraphs, save burst for enrage.

caster.note: entranced / cult zealots: kite-away + interruptible cast bar. Teaches interrupt, gap-close, LoS, kill-order.

duelist.note: rogues / bandits / deserters: fast 0.9s cadence, low per-hit. Teaches sustained mitigation + disengage.

guarded.note: warriors / enforcers: slow, high hp, big telegraphed swing. Teaches burst windows, positioning.

swarm.note: starving dogs / the Hungering: 3-5 pulls, weak singly, share aggro. Teaches AoE usage + when NOT to AoE.
